description: Dataset sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

notes: Bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.
Dataset still contains inferred downstream rule scope that requires review.

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( {id}))

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.Pipeline
tables.predicate: pipelineId IN (SELECT pipelineId FROM [core].[Pipeline] WHERE datasetId IN ( {id} ) )

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( {id}))

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleColumn].inputDatasetColumnId AND p.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleCondition].inputDatasetColumnId AND p.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleLink].outputDatasetColumnId AND p.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.Step
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Pipeline] p WHERE p.pipelineId = [core].[Step].pipelineId AND p.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.Activity
tables.predicate: pipelineId IN (SELECT pipelineId FROM [core].[Pipeline] WHERE datasetId IN ( {id} ) )

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] p INNER JOIN [core].[DatasetColumn] _p1 ON _p1.datasetColumnId = p.inputDatasetColumnId WHERE p.ruleConditionId = [core].[RuleConditionValue].ruleConditionId AND _p1.datasetId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDatasetObjectsTran body.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected dataset scope.

steps.title: Dataset deploy
steps.description: Deploy the dataset using the target ETL service.

steps.title: Sync date
steps.description: Stamp the dataset sync date after deployment.
